title: 'Eliyshama` #0476
definition:
Elishama = "my God has heard"

 1) an  Ephraimite chief in the wilderness
 2) a son of David
 3) Jehoiakim's secretary
 4) a priest who taught the law
 5) a man of Judah
nasbUsage:
Definition: Elishama = "my God has heard"

 1) an  Ephraimite chief in the wilderness
 2) a son of David
 3) Jehoiakim's secretary
 4) a priest who taught the law
 5) a man of Judah

    NASB:  God has heard, the name of several Isr.
